title: To require disclosure when personalized algorithmic pricing is used, and for other purposes.
action: Referred to the House Committee on Energy and Commerce.
summary: This bill aims to require businesses to disclose when they use personalized algorithmic pricing, so customers know when they're being charged based on their individual data. The bill also has other purposes, but more details are needed to provide a full summary.

title: To amend the National Artificial Intelligence Initiative Act of 2020 to establish a center on artificial intelligence to ensure continued United States leadership in research, development, and evaluation of artificial intelligence systems, and for other purposes.
action: Referred to the House Committee on Science, Space, and Technology.
summary: This document aims to make changes to the existing National Artificial Intelligence Initiative Act of 2020. It proposes establishing a new center focused on artificial intelligence research, development, and evaluation.

title: Workforce for AI Trust Act
action: Referred to the House Committee on Science, Space, and Technology.
summary: This policy aims to promote trust in the workforce that designs, develops, and maintains artificial intelligence systems. Its title suggests a focus on the people involved in creating and managing AI.

title: To require reports regarding artificial intelligence-related job impacts, and for other purposes.
action: Referred to the House Committee on Education and Workforce.
summary: This bill aims to require businesses to report on the impact of artificial intelligence on jobs, with intentions to address its effects on employment.

title: A bill to prohibit certain uses of automated decision systems by employers, and for other purposes.
action: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions.
summary: This bill aims to restrict how employers use automated decision systems, limiting their use in certain ways. It also appears to cover other related purposes beyond just automated decision systems.

title: A bill to amend the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 to impose an excise tax on systemically important AI activity, and for other purposes.
action: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Finance.
summary: This bill aims to introduce an excise tax on AI activities that are considered systemically important. It is intended to target and regulate AI systems that have a significant impact on the economy.

title: Artificial Intelligence Environmental Impacts Act of 2026
action: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Environment and Public Works.
summary: The Artificial Intelligence Environmental Impacts Act of 2026 aims to address the environmental consequences of artificial intelligence technology. This law will likely establish regulations to minimize AI's negative effects on the environment and ecosystems.

title: SBA Artificial Intelligence Utilization Act of 2026
action: Placed on the Union Calendar, Calendar No. 594.
summary: The SBA Artificial Intelligence Utilization Act of 2026 is a law aimed at using AI to benefit small business owners. Its specifics are unknown without more information.

title: Secure and Accountable Military AI Act of 2026
action: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Armed Services.
summary: The Secure and Accountable Military AI Act of 2026 is a policy aimed at ensuring the safe and responsible use of AI in military settings. This policy likely involves establishing guidelines and regulations to prevent potential risks associated with AI in military applications.

title: A bill to require the Secretary of Homeland Security to conduct annual assessments on threats to the United States posed by the use of generative artificial intelligence for terrorism, and for other purposes.
action: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs.
summary: This document proposes a bill that requires the Secretary of Homeland Security to conduct annual assessments on threats to the US related to the use of generative AI for terrorism. The bill aims to address and mitigate the potential risks associated with the use of generative AI in terrorist activities.

title: Artificial Intelligence Environmental Impacts Act of 2026

summary: The Artificial Intelligence Environmental Impacts Act of 2026 aims to address and regulate the potential environmental consequences of artificial intelligence technology.

title: Protecting Consumers from Deceptive AI Act
action: Referred to the House Committee on Science, Space, and Technology.
summary: The Protecting Consumers from Deceptive AI Act aims to safeguard consumers from false or misleading advertising and information generated by artificial intelligence. This legislation likely seeks to hold individuals and companies accountable for any harm caused by deceptive AI practices.

title: To promote United States leadership in technical standards by directing the National Institute of Standards and Technology and the Department of State to take certain actions to encourage and enable United States participation in developing standards and specifications for artificial intelligence and other critical and emerging technologies, and for other purposes.
action: Referred to the House Committee on Science, Space, and Technology.
summary: This policy aims to promote US leadership in technical standards and encourage US participation in AI and emerging technologies. It directs the National Institute of Standards and Technology and the Department of State to take actions to achieve these goals.

title: To establish the Department of Advanced Technology and Artificial Intelligence, and for other purposes.
action: Referred to the House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform.
summary: This policy establishes the Department of Advanced Technology and Artificial Intelligence to oversee and direct the development and implementation of advanced technology and AI in various sectors.

title: Protecting Consumers from Deceptive AI Act
action: Referred to the Committee on Energy and Commerce, and in addition to the Committee on Science, Space, and Technology, for a period to be subsequently determined by the Speaker, in each case for consideration of such provisions as fall within the jurisdiction of the committee concerned.
summary: The Protecting Consumers from Deceptive AI Act is a policy aimed at safeguarding individuals from misleading or false representations made using artificial intelligence technology. Its goal is to establish regulations that prevent AI-powered deception in a way that is transparent and fair to consumers.

title: Heat Emergency Assessment and Tracking using AI Act
action: Referred to the House Committee on Energy and Commerce.
summary: The Heat Emergency Assessment and Tracking using AI Act aims to utilize artificial intelligence to better track and assess heat-related emergencies. The act likely seeks to leverage AI technology to provide early warnings, more accurate data, and effective responses to heat emergencies.

title: To provide for a right of action against Federal employees for violations of First Amendment rights relating to the use or development of artificial intelligence.
action: Referred to the House Committee on the Judiciary.
summary: The policy aims to give individuals the right to take legal action against federal employees who use or develop artificial intelligence in a way that violates their First Amendment rights. This policy seeks to protect individuals' freedom of expression from AI-related abuses by federal employees.

title: To require the Secretary of Energy to establish a centralized resource for access to data to facilitate biological research through enabling advanced computational methods such as artificial intelligence, and for other purposes.
action: Referred to the House Committee on Science, Space, and Technology.
summary: This policy aims to establish a central resource for biological research data to support advanced computational methods like artificial intelligence. It seeks to provide greater access and facilitate the use of AI in biological research.

title: A bill to require the Secretary of Energy to establish a centralized resource for access to data to facilitate biological research through enabling advanced computational methods such as artificial intelligence, and for other purposes.

summary: This bill requires the Secretary of Energy to create a centralized resource to make research data more accessible, with the goal of advancing biological research and using artificial intelligence. The bill aims to facilitate biological research through computational methods and other means.

summary: This document expresses the opinion of the House of Representatives on the use of artificial intelligence in the financial services and housing industries. It likely provides a statement or position on the issue but no further information is available.

summary: The Small Business Artificial Intelligence Advancement Act aims to support and advance the use of artificial intelligence in small businesses. title: A bill to require the Office of Financial Research to compel data relating to the financing of artificial intelligence development, provide that data to Congress, and issue recommendations to financial regulatory agencies and Congress to mitigate financial stability risk, and for other purposes.

summary: This bill requires the Office of Financial Research to gather and share data about the financing of artificial intelligence development, and to make recommendations to mitigate any financial risks associated with AI. The data and recommendations will be provided to Congress to help inform policy decisions.

title: Protect Elections from Deceptive AI Act
action: Referred to the House Committee on House Administration.
summary: The "Protect Elections from Deceptive AI Act" aims to safeguard the integrity of elections by preventing the use of false or misleading information generated by artificial intelligence. The act likely seeks to establish laws or regulations to combat AI-generated disinformation and maintain the trustworthiness of the electoral process.

summary: The Deterring American AI Model Theft Act of 2026 is a bill aimed at preventing the unauthorized theft of American artificial intelligence models. It likely proposes laws and regulations to protect intellectual property and national security from AI model theft.
